reasoning: The consensus sportsbook odds strongly anchor the Ravens as one of the top favorites to win Super Bowl LX. As of August 31, 2025, they are generally listed at +700 (implied probability of 12.5%) alongside the Bills and Eagles. When factoring in standard futures market vig, this implies a "true" probability of approximately 10-11%. The Athletic’s statistical model placed their odds at 11.9%, and Polymarket was trading at 12% on August 21 before the final preseason games. In the past week, QB Lamar Jackson suffered a minor injury scare but was swiftly cleared as completely fine, reaffirming his health for the start of the season. A few other minor injuries don't fundamentally shift their Super Bowl prospects. A prediction of 11% is a well-calibrated reflection of the vig-adjusted sportsbook consensus and statistical models heading into the regular season.
